cognitum.description: Cognitum Cloud control plane (api.cognitum.one). 7 cloud MCP tools: catalog, orders, witness chain, etc. Add COGNITUM_API_KEY for write operations. NOTE: server-side MCP-SSE protocol bug observed 2026-05-24 (missing endpoint event); fix needed at cognitum.one. See crates/ruvector-cognitum-host/README.md.

cognitum-seed.description: Cognitum Seed appliance over USB-gadget (cable-trust, no auth, no TLS). Default + highest-priority transport per the device's own auto-detect (see /run/media/$USER/COGNITUM/open.html). Requires this fork's crates/ruvector-cognitum-host/deploy/install.sh to be run first (otherwise NetworkManager dead-loops on DHCP and 169.254.42.1 is unreachable).

cognitum-seed-wifi.description: Cognitum Seed via mDNS (Wi-Fi or USB), bearer token auth. Hostname cognitum-578b.local is device-specific (CPU-serial suffix from STATUS.txt) — update if the Seed changes. Requires the Seed to be on Wi-Fi (per ADR-048: bearer auth mandatory off-USB) and avahi-daemon running on the host.
